IMethodRoute Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Represents a specific route for a method.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IMethodRoute

The IMethodRoute type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
ClientSuffix
Sets a client suffix for this route, in case it differs from other route only by the use of parameters.
HttpMethods
Returns the dictionary of declared HTTP methods for this route.
IsDeprecated
Method
Returns the base method.
Parameters
RouteParameters
SortOrder
Gets or sets the priority for this route. By default, the method's sort order is used. Routes with a lower sort order are tried first.
Tags
Url
Returns the URL for this route.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
GetParameters
Top
Extension Methods
  NameDescription
GetParameters (Defined by ExtensionMethods.)
Handle(String, ActionIRequest)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input and returns no data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
Handle(String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, Task)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data, and returns no data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
Handle(String, IResponseBuilderSelector)Overloaded.
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request that takes no input data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, ActionTContent, IRequest)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, Task)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns no data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTResult(String, FuncIRequest, TResult)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTResult(String, FuncIRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that expects no input data and returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, IResponseBuilderSelector)Overloaded.
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent(String, IResponseBuilder)Overloaded.
Defines a generic handler for an HTTP request.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent, TResult(String, FuncTContent, IRequest, TResult)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleTContent, TResult(String, FuncTContent, IRequest, CancellationToken, TaskTResult)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP request that returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleGet(IResponseBuilderSelector, Type)Overloaded.
Defines a generic GET handler for an HTTP request.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleGetT(FuncIRequest, T)Overloaded.
Defines a synchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)
HandleGetT(FuncIRequest, TaskT)Overloaded.
Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request that returns JSON data.
(Defined by RouteExtensionMethods.)

Defines an asynchronous handler for an HTTP GET request and returns JSON data.
